# Layer Verdict Dashboard (층위별 판정 현황)

**Source:** Auto-generated by Dataview from atom YAML frontmatter
**Layer:** All

## Verdict by Layer (층위별 판정 현황)

```dataview
TABLE
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.verdict = "CORROBORATED")) AS "입증",
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.verdict = "NEEDS_MORE_EVIDENCE")) AS "추가증거필요",
  length(filter(rows, (r) => r.verdict = "WEAKENED")) AS "약화",
  length(rows) AS "전체",
  round(length(filter(rows, (r) => r.verdict = "CORROBORATED")) / length(rows) * 100) + "%" AS "입증률"
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE layer
GROUP BY layer
SORT layer ASC
```

## Strong Findings by Layer (층위별 강력 발견사항)

```dataview
TABLE verdict, strength, claimType
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE strength = "STRONG" AND verdict = "CORROBORATED"
SORT layer ASC, file.name ASC
```

## Claim Type Distribution (유형별 분포)

```dataview
TABLE length(rows) AS "건수", min(rows.layer) + "–" + max(rows.layer) AS "층위"
FROM "wiki/claims"
WHERE claimType
GROUP BY claimType
SORT length(rows) DESC
```

## Key Takeaways

- Track corroboration rates across layers to identify proof system gaps
- STRONG CORROBORATED findings are the backbone of the proof system
